parameters.query:
SELECT nf.id as finding_id, nf.title, nf.severity, nf.priority_bucket,
       nf.evidence_summary, nf.remediation_evidence,
       nf.engagement_id, a.asset_value
FROM normalized_findings nf
JOIN assets a ON nf.asset_id = a.id
WHERE nf.remediation_status = 'fixed_pending_retest'
  AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM retest_records rr WHERE rr.finding_id = nf.id AND rr.result IS NULL)
LIMIT 20;

parameters.jsCode:
const body = $input.first().json.body || $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { finding_id: body.finding_id } }];

parameters.query:
SELECT nf.id as finding_id, nf.title, nf.severity, nf.priority_bucket, nf.evidence_summary, nf.remediation_evidence, nf.engagement_id, a.asset_value
FROM normalized_findings nf
JOIN assets a ON nf.asset_id = a.id
WHERE nf.id = '{{ $json.finding_id }}'
LIMIT 1;

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  text: '🔄 *RECON OS — Retest Scheduled*
Finding: ' + $('Get Single Finding').first().json.title + '
Asset: ' + $('Get Single Finding').first().json.asset_value + '
Severity: ' + $('Get Single Finding').first().json.severity.toUpperCase() + '
Retest ID: ' + $('Create Retest Record').first().json.id + '
Submit result: POST /webhook/recon-os/retests/result
{"retest_id":"' + $('Create Retest Record').first().json.id + '","result":"pass|fail|partial","retest_evidence":"..."}',
  username: 'RECON OS',
  icon_emoji: ':repeat:'
}) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, retest_id: $('Create Retest Record').first().json.id, scheduled_at: 'In 24 hours', finding_id: $('Get Single Finding').first().json.finding_id }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, retest_id: $('Validate Result Input').first().json.retest_id, result: $('Validate Result Input').first().json.result }) }}

meta.description: RECON OS WF-15: Retest Scheduler — schedules retests for fixed_pending_retest findings (webhook or weekly cron). Also receives analyst retest results at /recon-os/retests/result and calls WF-16 validator.
